note: First forecast benefiting from auto-injected lessons feedback loop.
regime_read: Dominant regime still bullish, but 5-day green streak broke 2026-04-20 with first meaningful red/control-loss session. Trend continuation no longer clean; opening-strength fade and intraday reversal risk now matter more than automatic buy-the-dip continuation.

same_dow_references.summary: clean bullish gap-and-go staircase trend, shallow lunch hold, close near HOD

time_window_expectations.10am: early probe/fade resolving; bias improves only if price reclaims opening structure
time_window_expectations.12pm: likely midday stall or flush; not ideal to chase highs
time_window_expectations.2pm: key repair/continuation window if bullish forecast right
time_window_expectations.4pm: finish in upper half, likely not extreme HOD close but stronger than noon

probable_goat.rationale: best long likely AFTER weakness, not opening impulse (lessons applied)

tactical_bias.invalidation: immediate acceptance below opening test low OR failure of any 10:00 reclaim OR repeated failed rallies after noon with expanding lower lows

confidence_notes: Biggest risk: Monday was not a one-day reset but start of broader exhaustion phase. If so, Tuesday could open weak, fail reclaim, turn into second-day downside continuation instead of rebound.
lessons_applied: Prior 5-day green run reduces blind continuation confidence
Opening-fade risk weighted more heavily after streak break
Net close vs intraday path separated explicitly
GOAT placed AFTER morning weakness, not at opening impulse
Close forecast upper-range but NOT near-extreme
